summary.default: Software Engineer focused on backend (Node/NestJS) with experience in frontend (React). Strong background in APIs, distributed systems, observability (Grafana/CloudWatch), and testing. Always looking to sharpen my skills and ship high-quality software to production.
summary.backend_focused: Backend Software Engineer specializing in Node.js/NestJS with expertise in distributed systems, API design, and performance optimization. Proven track record of reducing latency by 60% through architectural improvements and data structure optimization.
summary.full_stack: Full-Stack Software Engineer with strong backend expertise (Node.js/NestJS) and frontend experience (React/TypeScript). Experienced in end-to-end feature delivery, from requirements to production, with focus on scalable architecture and observability.
summary.rv_focused: Software Engineer with hands-on experience designing and maintaining complex variable compensation systems tied to real financial operations. Specialized in backend development with Node.js/NestJS, with strong expertise in business rule modeling, financial calculation engines, and CRM integrations (Dynamics 365).
